message:
fix(codegen): Emit discards for params with defaults to prevent unused warnings

Fix unused function parameter errors by extending the early discard emission
to include parameters with defaults. Previously, params with defaults were
skipped in the early discard loop, relying on later handling that didn't
emit discards for unused params. Now we emit discards for all params,
using the renamed name ({name}_param) for params with defaults.

Error count: 63 → 61
